name: vscode-chat-customizations-evaluations
description: Extension for analyzing, validating, and improving AI prompts

scripts.bundle: npm run bundle:server && npm run bundle:client
scripts.build: npm run compile && cd client && npm run compile
scripts.build:all: npm run compile && cd client && npm install && npm run compile
scripts.lint: eslint src && cd client && npx eslint src
scripts.clean: rm -rf out && cd client && rm -rf out

chatCustomizationsEvaluations.enable.description: Enable/disable the Chat Customizations Evaluations extension

chatCustomizationsEvaluations.trace.serv.description: Traces the communication between VS Code and the language server

chatCustomizationsEvaluations.model.description: Model to use for analysis (for example: gpt-4o, gpt-4.1, gpt-4.1-mini). Defaults to gpt-4o.

name.description: Short name for this custom diagnostic

description.description: Diagnostic instructions for the LLM analyzer

chatCustomizationsEvaluations.customDiag.markdownDescription: Array of custom diagnostics to apply during analysis. Each object has `name` and `description` fields. Example: add `[{"name": "Output Schema", "description": "Flag if the prompt does not define a JSON output schema."}]`

chatCustomizationsEvaluations.waza.comma.description: Command used to invoke waza (for example: waza, /usr/local/bin/waza)

chatCustomizationsEvaluations.waza.alway.description: Automatically run an existing waza eval after Fix Diagnostics applies improvements

editor/content.when: !chatCustomizationsEvaluations.hasDiagnostics && !chatCustomizationsEvaluations.isAnalyzing && (editorLangId == prompt || editorLangId == chatagent || editorLangId == skill || editorLangId == instructions || resourceFilename == AGENTS.md)
chatCustomizationsEvaluations.hasDiagnostics && (editorLangId == prompt || editorLangId == chatagent || editorLangId == skill || editorLangId == instructions || resourceFilename == AGENTS.md)

chat/customizations/item.when: !chatCustomizationsEvaluations.isAnalyzing && (aiCustomizationManagementItemType == prompt || aiCustomizationManagementItemType == instructions || aiCustomizationManagementItemType == skill || aiCustomizationManagementItemType == agent)
aiCustomizationManagementItemType == prompt || aiCustomizationManagementItemType == instructions || aiCustomizationManagementItemType == skill || aiCustomizationManagementItemType == agent
aiCustomizationManagementItemType == prompt || aiCustomizationManagementItemType == instructions || aiCustomizationManagementItemType == skill || aiCustomizationManagementItemType == agent
